country_result:
Country: Peru
Coordinates: -12.0463, -77.0422
City: Unknown
Continent: South America
final_reasoning: The image shows a two-lane paved road with double white center lines and yellow shoulder lines, cutting through a rocky, arid landscape. The terrain consists of stratified sedimentary rock formations and sparse, low-lying scrub vegetation, characteristic of high-altitude desert or semi-arid regions. There are no buildings, pedestrians, shops, or flags visible. The road markings (double white center, yellow edges) and the general landscape are highly characteristic of the Andean highlands in South America, specifically in regions like Peru or Bolivia. The specific geological formations and the road style are consistent with the roads leading through the Altiplano or the coastal mountains of Peru. Based on the visual evidence of the road infrastructure and the specific arid, rocky terrain, this is located in Peru.
